rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and connections should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Guarantee statements should not be placed in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts must relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
